revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称= 桜間神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]]高川原桜間281 |祭神= [[木花開耶姫命]] |社格= …」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 桜間神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]]高川原桜間281 |祭神= [[木花開耶姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[石井町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、[[鎌倉時代]]の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に[[吉野川]]から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。
桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、[[徳島藩]]主の[[蜂須賀斉昌]]は、[[1828年]]（[[文政]]11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して[[海部郡 (徳島県)|海部郡]]東由岐（現在の[[美波町]]）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。
[[1969年]]（[[昭和]]44年）[[9月9日]]に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。
== 祭神 == * [[木花開耶姫命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]][[府中駅 (徳島県)|府中駅]]より徒歩約40分。
== 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、[[徳島藩]]主の[[蜂須賀斉昌]]は、[[1828年]]（[[文政]]11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して[[海部郡 (徳島県)|海部郡]]東由岐（現在の[[美波町]]）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。
[[1969年]]（[[昭和]]44年）[[9月9日]]に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。
== 祭神 == * [[木花開耶姫命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]][[府中駅 (徳島県)|府中駅]]より徒歩約40分。

{{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]]高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[木花開耶姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[石井町]]にある[[神社]]。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 == 祭神 == * [[木花開耶姫命]] == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、[[鎌倉時代]]の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に[[吉野川 (代表的なトピック)|吉野川]]から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、[[徳島藩]]主の[[蜂須賀斉昌]]は、[[1828年]]（[[文政]]11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して[[海部郡 (徳島県)|海部郡]]東由岐（現在の[[美波町]]）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。[[1969年]]（[[昭和]]44年）[[9月9日]]に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[府中駅 (徳島県)|府中駅]]」より徒歩で約40分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

revision.comment: 6 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]]高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[木花開耶姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[石井町]]にある[[神社]]。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 == 祭神 == * [[木花開耶姫命]] == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、[[鎌倉時代]]の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に[[吉野川 (代表的なトピック)|吉野川]]から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、[[徳島藩]]主の[[蜂須賀斉昌]]は、[[1828年]]（[[文政]]11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して[[海部郡 (徳島県)|海部郡]]東由岐（現在の[[美波町]]）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。[[1969年]]（[[昭和]]44年）[[9月9日]]に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[府中駅 (徳島県)|府中駅]]」より徒歩で約40分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]

{{translated page|ja|桜間神社|version=107355260|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[名西郡]][[石井町]]高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[木花開耶姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[石井町]]にある[[神社]]。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 == 祭神 == * [[木花開耶姫命]] == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、[[鎌倉時代]]の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に[[吉野川 (代表的なトピック)|吉野川]]から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、[[徳島藩]]主の[[蜂須賀斉昌]]は、[[1828年]]（[[文政]]11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して[[海部郡 (徳島県)|海部郡]]東由岐（現在の[[美波町]]）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。[[1969年]]（[[昭和]]44年）[[9月9日]]に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[府中駅 (徳島県)|府中駅]]」より徒歩で約40分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] ==End Japanese==

[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|桜間神社|version=107355260|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名西郡|Q1155732}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、{{jalink|鎌倉時代|Q236205}}の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に{{jalink|吉野川 (代表的なトピック)||吉野川}}から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、{{jalink|徳島藩|Q3034557}}主の{{jalink|蜂須賀斉昌|Q304892}}は、{{jalink|1828年|Q7570}}（{{jalink|文政|Q1327119}}11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して{{jalink|海部郡 (徳島県)|Q1155923|海部郡}}東由岐（現在の{{jalink|美波町|Q1351153}}）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。{{jalink|1969年|Q2485}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}44年）{{jalink|9月9日|Q2856}}に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 == 交通 == * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|府中駅 (徳島県)|Q6455068|府中駅}}」より徒歩で約40分。 == 参考文献 == * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakurama Shrine'''|桜間神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|lt=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名西郡|Q1155732}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、{{jalink|鎌倉時代|Q236205}}の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に{{jalink|吉野川 (代表的なトピック)||吉野川}}から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、{{jalink|徳島藩|Q3034557}}主の{{jalink|蜂須賀斉昌|Q304892}}は、{{jalink|1828年|Q7570}}（{{jalink|文政|Q1327119}}11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して{{jalink|海部郡 (徳島県)|Q1155923|海部郡}}東由岐（現在の{{jalink|美波町|Q1351153}}）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。{{jalink|1969年|Q2485}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}44年）{{jalink|9月9日|Q2856}}に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|府中駅 (徳島県)|Q6455068|府中駅}}」より徒歩で約40分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]

|画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名西郡|Q1155732}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、{{jalink|鎌倉時代|Q236205}}の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に{{jalink|吉野川 (代表的なトピック)||吉野川}}から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、{{jalink|徳島藩|Q3034557}}主の{{jalink|蜂須賀斉昌|Q304892}}は、{{jalink|1828年|Q7570}}（{{jalink|文政|Q1327119}}11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して{{jalink|海部郡 (徳島県)|Q1155923|海部郡}}東由岐（現在の{{jalink|美波町|Q1351153}}）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。{{jalink|1969年|Q2485}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}44年）{{jalink|9月9日|Q2856}}に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|府中駅 (徳島県)|Q6455068|府中駅}}」より徒歩で約40分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] [[Category:need translation]]

拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名西郡|Q1155732}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、{{jalink|鎌倉時代|Q236205}}の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に{{jalink|吉野川 (代表的なトピック)||吉野川}}から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、{{jalink|徳島藩|Q3034557}}主の{{jalink|蜂須賀斉昌|Q304892}}は、{{jalink|1828年|Q7570}}（{{jalink|文政|Q1327119}}11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して{{jalink|海部郡 (徳島県)|Q1155923|海部郡}}東由岐（現在の{{jalink|美波町|Q1351153}}）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。{{jalink|1969年|Q2485}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}44年）{{jalink|9月9日|Q2856}}に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|府中駅 (徳島県)|Q6455068|府中駅}}」より徒歩で約40分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名西郡|Q1155732}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、{{jalink|鎌倉時代|Q236205}}の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に{{jalink|吉野川 (代表的なトピック)||吉野川}}から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、{{jalink|徳島藩|Q3034557}}主の{{jalink|蜂須賀斉昌|Q304892}}は、{{jalink|1828年|Q7570}}（{{jalink|文政|Q1327119}}11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して{{jalink|海部郡 (徳島県)|Q1155923|海部郡}}東由岐（現在の{{jalink|美波町|Q1351153}}）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。{{jalink|1969年|Q2485}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}44年）{{jalink|9月9日|Q2856}}に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|府中駅 (徳島県)|Q6455068|府中駅}}」より徒歩で約40分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 桜間神社 |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名西郡|Q1155732}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}高川原桜間281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=桜間神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''桜間神社'''（さくらまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|石井町|Q1205943}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。徳島県指定史跡の'''桜間の池跡'''があることで知られる。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|木花開耶姫命}} === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。境内には池があり、{{jalink|鎌倉時代|Q236205}}の『夫木和歌集』では、桜間の池は「鏡のように美しい池」と詠まれている。しかし、後に{{jalink|吉野川 (代表的なトピック)||吉野川}}から流れ出た土砂で、池の規模が大きく縮小した。 桜間の池の美しさを後世に残す為、{{jalink|徳島藩|Q3034557}}主の{{jalink|蜂須賀斉昌|Q304892}}は、{{jalink|1828年|Q7570}}（{{jalink|文政|Q1327119}}11年）に石碑建立を命じ、約6千人を動員して{{jalink|海部郡 (徳島県)|Q1155923|海部郡}}東由岐（現在の{{jalink|美波町|Q1351153}}）の海岸から約75tの巨岩を運んだ。{{jalink|1969年|Q2485}}（{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}44年）{{jalink|9月9日|Q2856}}に「桜間の池跡（石碑）」が徳島県指定史跡に指定された。 === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|府中駅 (徳島県)|Q6455068|府中駅}}」より徒歩で約40分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Myozai District|Q1155732}}{{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{jalink|Kamakura period|Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{jalink|Yoshino River||Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{jalink|Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892}}, lord of the {{jalink|Tokushima Domain|Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{jalink|1828|Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{jalink|Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|Kaifu District}} (today's {{jalink|Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153}}). On {{jalink|September 9|Q2856}}, {{jalink|1969|Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|Fuchu Station}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] [[Category:need translation]]

Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Myozai District|Q1155732}}{{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{jalink|Kamakura period|Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{jalink|Yoshino River||Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{jalink|Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892}}, lord of the {{jalink|Tokushima Domain|Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{jalink|1828|Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{jalink|Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|Kaifu District}} (today's {{jalink|Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153}}). On {{jalink|September 9|Q2856}}, {{jalink|1969|Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|Fuchu Station}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]] [[Category:need translation]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Myozai District|Q1155732}}{{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{jalink|Kamakura period|Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{jalink|Yoshino River||Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{jalink|Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892}}, lord of the {{jalink|Tokushima Domain|Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{jalink|1828|Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{jalink|Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|Kaifu District}} (today's {{jalink|Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153}}). On {{jalink|September 9|Q2856}}, {{jalink|1969|Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|Fuchu Station}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Myozai District|Q1155732}}{{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{jalink|Kamakura period|Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{jalink|Yoshino River||Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{jalink|Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892}}, lord of the {{jalink|Tokushima Domain|Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{jalink|1828|Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{jalink|Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|Kaifu District}} (today's {{jalink|Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153}}). On {{jalink|September 9|Q2856}}, {{jalink|1969|Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|Fuchu Station}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River||WD=|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River||WD=|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River||WD=|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|WD=|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:さくらましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]][[Category:qq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]
