== name in kana (P1814) == * さくらまじんじゃ * マノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7480005001212 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041358|ltq=Q135041358|WD=Q135041358|1=Mano- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県名西郡石井町高川原桜間281', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市明神町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:桜間神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]

{{wikidata link|Q48758398}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Sakurama Shrine |画像 = [[File:Sakurama shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Myozai District|Q1155732|WD=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}} Takagawara Sakurama 281 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Sakurama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Sakurama Shrine''' (さくらまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ishii, Tokushima|Q1205943|WD=Q1205943|1=Ishii, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is known for the '''Sakurama Pond Site''', a Tokushima Prefecture designated historic site. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} === History === The year of foundation is unknown. There is a pond in the precincts, and in the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|WD=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} poetry collection ''Fuboku Wakashū'', Sakurama Pond is praised as "a pond as beautiful as a mirror." Later, however, sediment carried out from the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}} greatly reduced the size of the pond. To preserve the beauty of Sakurama Pond for later generations, {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Narinori|Q304892|WD=Q304892|1=Hachisuka Narimasa}}, lord of the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Domain|Q3034557|WD=Q3034557|1=Tokushima Domain}}, ordered a stone monument to be erected in {{ill|lt=1828|Q7570|WD=Q7570|1=1828}} (Bunsei 11), mobilizing about 6,000 people to transport a giant rock of about 75 tons from the coast of Higashi-Yuki in {{ill|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|Q1155923|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} (today's {{ill|lt=Minami, Tokushima|Q1351153|WD=Q1351153|1=Minami, Tokushima}}). On {{ill|lt=September 9|Q2856|WD=Q2856|1=September 9}}, {{ill|lt=1969|Q2485|WD=Q2485|1=1969}} (Shōwa 44), the "Sakurama Pond Site (stone monument)" was designated a Tokushima Prefecture historic site. === Access === * About 40 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Fuchu Station (Tokushima)|Q6455068|WD=Q6455068|lt=Fuchu Station|1=Kō Station (Tokushima)}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}}, ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sakurama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:石井町の歴史]] [[Category:石井町の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県指定史跡]]
